# Boe Billing Labor Tickets

```sql
use DataWarehouse
GO

--DECLARE @BASE_ID NVARCHAR(10) = '1627520'
DECLARE @COIDS NVARCHAR(100) = '1627520'


SELECT COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
, SR.USER_1
, SR.USER_9
, LT.[TYPE]
, LT.RESOURCE_ID
, SUM(HOURS_WORKED) 
FROM DataWarehouse.dbo.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL
INNER JOIN DataWarehouse.dbo.DEMAND_SUPPLY_LINK DSL
	ON COL.CUST_ORDER_ID = DSL.DEMAND_BASE_ID
	AND COL.LINE_NO = DSL.DEMAND_SEQ_NO
INNER JOIN DataWarehouse.dbo.WORK_ORDER WO
	ON DSL.SUPPLY_BASE_ID = WO.BASE_ID
	AND DSL.SUPPLY_LOT_ID = WO.LOT_ID
	AND DSL.SUPPLY_SPLIT_ID = WO.SPLIT_ID
INNER JOIN DataWarehouse.dbo.LABOR_TICKET LT
	ON WO.BASE_ID = LT.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	AND WO.LOT_ID = LT.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	AND WO.SPLIT_ID = LT.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	AND WO.SUB_ID = LT.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	AND WO.[TYPE] = LT.WORKORDER_TYPE
INNER JOIN SHOP_RESOURCE SR
	ON LT.RESOURCE_ID = SR.ID
WHERE COL.CUST_ORDER_ID IN ('001712288', '001717813', '001718314', '001718862', '001720819', '001722023', '001722377', '001722440', '001722804', '001722817', '001722969', '001722970', '001722996', '001723121', '001723122', '001723123', '001723139', '001723140', '001723153', '001723155', '001723176', '001723201', '001723209', '001723212', '001723213', '001723246', '001723247', '001723248', AND (WORKORDER_BASE_ID NOT LIKE 'RW%' OR WORKORDER_BASE_ID NOT LIKE '%R%')
--WHERE WORKORDER_BASE_ID = @BASE_ID 
--AND (SR.USER_9 != 'BOE BILLING EXCLUDE' OR SR.USER_9 IS NULL)

GROUP BY COL.CUST_ORDER_ID, LT.[TYPE], LT.RESOURCE_ID, SR.USER_1, SR.USER_9
ORDER BY COL.CUST_ORDER_ID, LT.[TYPE], LT.RESOURCE_ID, SR.USER_1, SR.USER_9

/*
SELECT * FROM LIVESupplemental.dbo.PartID_ReportSettings EX
WHERE REPORT_NAME LIKE 'usp_BOE_BILLING_%'
	AND REPORT_SECTION = 'MAIN INCLUSION'
--WHERE REPORT_NAME = 'usp_BOE_BILLING_MFG'
--	AND REPORT_SECTION = 'MAIN EXCLUSION'
	AND EX.PART_ID = '232W1104-1A'

SELECT * FROM LIVESupplemental.dbo.ResourceID_ReportSettings EX
--WHERE REPORT_NAME = 'usp_BOE_BILLING_MFG'
--	AND REPORT_SECTION = 'MAIN EXCLUSION'


--SELECT USER_9 FROM SHOP_RESOURCE GROUP BY USER_9
*/

select * from LIVESupplemental.dbo.[BOE_Stanchion_Cargo_Bay] CB
		where CB.[PART NUMBER] = '453U1343-65'
```
